feature1.title:
Do not just listen.
Start speaking now.
feature1.description:
Learn from global creators at your level.
Practice instantly with real time shadowing.
AI voice analysis corrects your pronunciation on the spot.
Ask questions anytime and get answers instantly.

feature2.title:
Review with what you saved.
Grow with what is made for you.
feature2.description:
AI analyzes your level and goals to recommend the right
sentences. Stay on track with daily targets.
Save the lines you love.
Turn your mistakes into your own study notes.

feature3.title:
Study together.
Compete together.
More fun. More growth.
feature3.description:
As your rank rises, so do your skills.
Stay motivated with rankings and friend leagues,
Turn your mistakes into your own study notes.
and enjoy the progress that keeps you going.

Subscribe with ease.
